zh.Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh.Carmarthenshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾
zh.Caerleon, Gwent, Wales: 英國威爾斯文特凱爾萊昂
zh.Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙姆爾凱爾萊昂
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel於1185年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾凱爾萊昂時，她的父親Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth36歲，母親Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog21歲。她於大約1171年與Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在威爾士。

zh-hans.Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh-hans.Carmarthenshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾
zh-hans.Caerleon, Gwent, Wales: 英国威尔斯文特凱爾萊昂
zh-hans.Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙姆爾凱爾萊昂
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel于1185年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾凱爾萊昂时，她的父亲Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth36岁，母亲Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog21岁。她于大约1171年与Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Sier  , unexplained. This surname is very rare in Germany.
Czech (Šír): nickname from Middle High German schīr ‘sheer, pure, clean’. Compare Schier .

variants.name: Sier
meanings: Dutch and German: from a short form of the personal name Sierik, Sierich, composed of the ancient Germanic elements sigi ‘victory’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’, or from a short form of the personal name Sigihard, composed of the ancient Germanic elements sigi + hari ‘army’.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: Fechan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Colm, Declan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fiacháin or Ó Féichín, a name meaning ‘little raven’, from a diminutive of fiach. Compare with Fegan and Fagan .

variants.name: Fegan
meanings: In origin a Welsh pet form of   Meg ;  nowadays it is much used as an independent first name throughout Britain and in America and elsewhere in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel was born in 1185, in Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth, was 36 and her mother, Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog, was 21. She married Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys about 1171, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Wales.

fr.Caerleon, Gwent, Wales: Caerleon, Gwent, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel est née en 1185, à Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys environ 1171, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel 1185 in Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth 36 und ihre Mutter Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog 21. Sie hat um 1171 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel è nata il nel 1185 nel Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys circa 1171, nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Galles.

ja.Gwent, Wales: イギリスウェールズグウエント

ja.Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Wales: ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアケエルレオン
ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywelが1185年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアケエルレオンで生まれた時，父Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerthは36歳，母Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliogは21歳であった。約1171年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーでMaredudd Gethin ap Rhysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel(이)가 1185년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 카이를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1171년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스에서 사망했다.

mn.Caerleon, Gwent, Wales: Caerleon, Gwent, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel nasceu em 1185, em Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys aproximadamente 1171, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Gales.

ro.Caerleon, Gwent, Wales: Caerleon, Gwent, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel родилась в 1185 г. в местности каирлеон, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys около 1171 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian Fechan verch Sir Hywel nació en 1185, en Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Maredudd Gethin ap Rhys aproximadamente 1171, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Gales.
